title: Hybrid Topology Trade-offs
prompt: Map the trade-offs of choosing a hybrid topology and coupling architecture for a Nigerian mini-grid. There is no single correct map — your job is to surface the *tensions* between resource, demand, reliability, cost, and operability.
relatedness_hints: the right topology depends on this — figure out how
the right topology depends on this — figure out how
one is sensitive to the other — name the direction
these are connected — you decide how
one favours the other — figure out which way
this can affect this — figure out the sign
these are connected — you decide how
these are connected — you decide how
